examples: Change the filter cartridge as often as instructed by the manufacturer.
He aimed his rifle, fired a single shot, then ejected the spent cartridge.
While serving a compulsory stint in the military, Nurmi entered a 20-k march carrying a rifle, a cartridge belt, and a knapsack.
Instead of having to remove and insert the ammo cartridge, giving it a firm jab suffices.
He pulled a version of the pen-cartridge steal he had done on Penn Jillette.
